sections.heading: Lambda Services Prompt Pack
sections.prose:
- Scope: event handling, cold-start sensitivity, IAM-safe behavior, logging.
- Core prompt: Implement lambda update with strict input validation and traceable logs.
- Small tasks: input schema -> handler update -> unit/integration tests -> deploy checklist.

items.text: Scope: event handling, cold-start sensitivity, IAM-safe behavior, logging.
Core prompt: Implement lambda update with strict input validation and traceable logs.
Small tasks: input schema -> handler update -> unit/integration tests -> deploy checklist.
